caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a black swivel arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a logo with five yellow stars and the phrase "UNCL HUSTLE" repeated vertically. To his right, a blue banner displays the text "BOSS TALK 101" and the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!". A black box and a black mug with "BOSS TALK 101" are visible on the table in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, looking slightly downward and to his left with a serious expression. The scene is static, with the man making very subtle shifts in his posture and facial expression as he listens or prepares to speak.
